item.title: Warren Buffett Warns Against This Costly Investing Mistake — and People Over 50 Need to Pay Attention
item.description: Sticking to a strategy that aligns with your goals and risk tolerance is key.

item.title: Robert Kiyosaki’s Life-Changing Lesson: Fail Boldly, Rise Rich
item.description: Mistakes are a learning lesson, not a reason to quit.

item.title: Here’s How to Track Your Tax Refund This Year
item.description: If you've already filed, the money should arrive soon — the IRS sends out most tax refunds within 21 days.

item.title: Why Feeling Financially Secure Depends on More Than Just Income
item.description: Debt and savings play a huge role.

item.title: Who Doesn’t Have to File Taxes This Year? Details for Retirees, Students and Gig Workers
item.description: Just because the IRS does not require you to file doesn't mean you shouldn't.
